violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Cases of food was stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.

Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Different species of raw animal food was not properly separated from each other or arranged according to minimum cooking temperatures. A case of raw bacon was stored above deli meats.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Scoop handles were stored in the pizza toppings.

Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. A glass front single door cooler maintained an internal temperature of 44 F.
Handwashing lavatories. — --Handwashing lavatory was used for purpose other than handwashing. A cooking utensil was stored in the handwashing sink.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Bagged ice was stored on the floor in the walk in freezer.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. Cheese scoop handles were stored in the product.
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
